passive.name: Prophet of an Elder God
passive.description: Illaoi and the Vessels she creates spawn Tentacles on nearby impassible terrain. Tentacles swing at spirits, Vessels, and victims of Illaoi's Harsh lesson. Tentacles deal physical damage to enemies hit, and will heal Illaoi if they damage a champion.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} Periodically, a {{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}} will spawn next to nearby [[terrain]]. It can be killed by enemy basic attacks and will become dormant if {{ci|Illaoi}} leaves it alone.
wiki_detail.blurb2: A {{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}} only attacks through '''Illaoi's''' abilities and does so by slamming the ground once, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit. Whenever it hits at least one enemy {{tip|champion}}, '''Illaoi''' is {{tip|heal|healed}} for a portion of {{as|her '''missing''' health}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} Periodically, '''Illaoi''' spawns a {{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}} on the nearest terrain perpendicular to her location, if no other Tentacles are already nearby it. Tentacles fully spawn after a 2 second delay and are {{tip|untargetable}} in the meantime.
wiki_detail.description2:
{{as|Tentacles|buzzword2}} are commanded to attack by '''Illaoi's''' [[champion ability|abilities]], dealing {{as|{{pp|9 to 162}} {{as|(+ 100% AD)}} {{as|(+ 40% AP)}} physical damage|physical damage}} to all enemies struck, increased by {{pp|0;10 to 30|0 to 5 for 6|key=%|formula=100% + 10% at rank 1, then 5% per rank|type = [[File:Tentacle Smash.png|20px|link=]] Tentacle Smash's rank}}.
Enemies struck by multiple slams within {{fd|0.5}} seconds of another, take 50% damage for the second and 25% damage for all other additional slams.
wiki_detail.description3: Each {{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}} also {{tip|heal|heals}} '''Illaoi''' for {{as|5% of her '''missing''' health}} if it hits at least one enemy {{tip|champion}}.
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tt|1000|Range around a tentacle within which Illaoi cannot spawn a tentacle in.}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* '''Illaoi''' cannot spawn '''''{{as|Tentacles|buzzword2}}''''' on ally invulnerable {{tip|turrets|structures}} {{bug|2|Added undocumented in 9.13}}, in addition to neither her nor the '''''{{as|Vessel|buzzword3}}''''' being able to spawn them in [[Nexus Obelisk|Nexus Obelisk's]] attack range.
** Even after ''Nexus turrets'' have lost their invulnerability, '''Illaoi''' still has issues spawning '''''{{as|Tentacles|buzzword2}}''''' on them (probably because of the nearby invulnerable ''Nexus''). {{bug|1}}
* '''''{{as|Tentacles|buzzword2}}''''' will prioritize spawning on map terrain before player-made ones.
* If multiple {{as|Tentacles|buzzword2}} hit simultaneously, the received healing is calculated iteratively based on the new amount of '''missing''' health, as per this formula: {{as|('''maximum''' health{{minus}}'''current''' health)}}{{times}}(1{{minus}}0.955<sup>n</sup>), with 'n' the number of {{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}} hits.

Q.name: Tentacle Smash
Q.description: Increases the damage dealt by Tentacles. When activated, Illaoi smashes down a Tentacle that deals physical damage.
Q.tooltip:
Passive: Slam damage is increased by {{ spell.illaoiq:tentacledamageamp*100 }}% (currently {{ spell.illaoiq:tentacledamagetotal }} physical damage).

Active: Illaoi swings her idol, causing a Tentacle to Slam forward.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} {{ai|Prophet of an Elder God|Illaoi|{{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}}}} damage is increased.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Illaoi}} slams down a {{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}} in the target direction, dealing {{as|physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Illaoi''' slams down a {{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}} in the target direction.
_comments: [[V12.6]] Is it just the visual indicator? or also Illaoi herself? Globally? Or does she need to be close to an enemy champion? Does she need to point the ability towards the enemy champion? Or also if she points the other way?

W.name: Harsh Lesson
W.description: Illaoi leaps to her target, dealing physical damage and causing nearby Tentacles to also swing at the target.
W.tooltip: Illaoi's next Attack causes her to leap at the target, dealing an additional {{ healthpercenttotal }} max Health physical damage. When she strikes, nearby Tentacles will Slam at the target.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{cis|Illaoi}} next basic attack gains {{sti|'''bonus''' attack range}} and causes her to {{tip|dash|leap}} to her target, dealing {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} and commanding nearby {{as|Tentacles|buzzword2}} to attack the target.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Illaoi's''' next [[basic attack]] within 6 seconds gains {{sti|range|225 '''bonus''' range}} and causes her to {{tip|dash|leap}} to the target's location if they're beyond her normal basic attack range.
wiki_detail.description2: The attack deals {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}, with a minimum threshold, and capped at 300 against non-champions, and commands all {{as|Tentacles|buzzword2}} in range to attack the target. The minimum '''bonus''' damage can also be applied against {{tip|turrets}}.
wiki_detail.leveling2:
{{st|Bonus Physical Damage|{{as|{{ap|3 to 5}}% {{as|(+ 4% per 100 AD)}} of target's '''maximum''' health|health}}}}
{{st|Minimum Physical Damage|{{ap|20 to 60}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: ''Harsh Lesson'' {{tip|basic attack reset|resets}} '''Illaoi's''' basic attack timer.
wiki_detail.description4: ''Harsh Lesson can be activated during '''Illaoi's''' other abilities, other than while {{ai|E|Illaoi|pulling}} a {{as|Spirit|buzzword}}.''

E.name: Test of Spirit
E.description: Illaoi rips the spirit from a foe's body, forcing it to stand before her. Spirits echo a percentage of the damage they take to the original target. If killed, or if the target gets too far from the spirit, the target will become a Vessel and begin spawning Tentacles.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Illaoi}} reaches with a tendril in the target direction that stops upon the first enemy hit. If the target is a {{tip|champion}}, she rips their {{as|Spirit|buzzword}} out from them to stand before her.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The {{as|Spirit|buzzword}} {{tip|tether|tethers}} to the target for a duration, dealing a portion of any damage it takes. If the {{as|Spirit|buzzword}} is killed or the target leaves its range, the target will be {{tip|slow|slowed}} and marked as a {{as|Vessel|buzzword3}} for a duration or until they {{tip|takedown}} '''Illaoi''', spawning {{as|Tentacles|buzzword2}} while marked.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{as|Tentacles|buzzword2}} will autonomously attack the nearest {{as|Spirit|buzzword}} or {{as|Vessel|buzzword3}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Illaoi''' launches a tendril in the target direction that stops at the first enemy hit, pulling their {{as|Spirit|buzzword}} out in front of '''Illaoi''' over {{fd|0.75}} seconds if they're a {{tip|champion}}. The target is {{tip|tether|tethered}} to the {{as|Spirit|buzzword}} for {{tt|7 seconds|Timer starts when the target gets hit}}, {{tip|true sight|revealing}} them in addition to granting {{tip|sight}} of the area around them while the tether remains.
wiki_detail.description2: The {{as|Spirit|buzzword}} spawns with the target's {{sti|health|{{as|'''current''' health}}}}, {{sti|{{as|armor}}}} and {{sti|mr|{{as|magic resist}}}}, and redirects a portion of the {{tt|pre-mitigation damage|Damage calculated before modifiers}} received to the tethered champion.
wiki_detail.description3: When the {{as|Spirit|buzzword}} is killed or the target leaves tether range, the tether is severed, marking the target as a {{as|Vessel|buzzword3}} for 10 seconds and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them by 80% for {{fd|1.5}} seconds once the tether returns back to them. Each {{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}} autonomously attacks the closest {{as|Vessel|buzzword3}} or {{as|Spirit|buzzword}}, prioritizing the latter, once every {{pp|5.5 to 3.5 for 3|1 to 13|formula=5.5-1 every 6 lvls. Cooldown starts upon starting the slam}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description4: Enemies made a {{as|Vessel|buzzword3}} also spawn a {{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}} near themselves every {{pp|5 to 3 for 3|1 to 13}} seconds. {{as|Tentacles|buzzword2}} can spawn 250 units closer to each other than when spawned by '''Illaoi'''.
wiki_detail.description5:
'''''Illaoi''' is {{tip|lockout|unable to act}} while firing the projectile and while the target's {{as|Spirit|buzzword}} is being pulled.''
'''''Illaoi''' cannot cast Test of Spirit again until the {{as|Spirit|buzzword}} dies.''
''{{as|Vessels|buzzword3}} can dispel the [[debuff]] by scoring a {{tip|takedown}} against '''Illaoi'''.''
wiki_detail.range: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} 950 / {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|100|Distance in front of Illaoi the Spirit is pulled to}}
wiki_detail.tips:
* Other than [[area of effect]]s, since {{ii|Riftmaker}}, {{bi|Aspect of the Dragon}} burn damage, and {{ai|The Darkin Scythe A|Shadow Assassin|The Darkin Scythe}} apply on the {{as|Spirit|Buzzword}} and the {{as|Vessel|buzzword3}} individually and as separate instances of damage, their '''bonus''' damage through the redirection is effectively enhanced. In particular, ''Riftmaker'' and ''The Darkin Scyte'' will further apply on their own redirected '''bonus''' damage.
** Note, the same does not apply for damage modifiers without a separate instance of damage (i.e {{ri|Last Stand}}).
** {{pending for test}} Does the above still apply for ''Riftmaker'' after its [[V12.23]] change?
_comments: [[V12.6]] just the projectile? or also Illaoi herself? Globally? Or does she need to be close to an enemy champion? Does she need to point the ability towards them? Or also if she points the other way?

R.name: Leap of Faith
R.description: Illaoi smashes her idol into the ground, dealing physical damage to nearby enemies. A Tentacle spawns for each enemy champion hit.
R.tooltip:
Illaoi smashes her idol into the ground, dealing {{ damagecalc }} physical damage to nearby enemies and spawning a Tentacle for each enemy champion hit.

For the next {{ duration }} seconds, Tentacles are untargetable and Slam 50% faster, and Harsh Lesson has a {{ spell.illaoiw:cooldownduringr }} second cooldown.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Illaoi}} becomes {{tip|displacement immunity|unstoppable}} before dealing {{as|physical damage}} to nearby enemies. For each enemy {{tip|champion}} hit, a {{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}} is summoned around her for a period.
wiki_detail.blurb2: For the duration, ''{{ais|Harsh Lesson|Illaoi}}'' cooldown is {{sti|ah|reduced}} and nearby {{as|Tentacles|buzzword2}} attack faster.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Illaoi''' gains {{tip|displacement immunity}} and leaps into the air for the cast time. She then slams her idol into the ground, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to nearby enemies. For each enemy champion hit, a {{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}} is summoned for 8 seconds (up to a maximum of 6 summons).
wiki_detail.description2: For the duration, ''{{ais|Harsh Lesson|Illaoi}}'' {{sti|cooldown}} is halved, all {{as|Tentacles|buzzword2}} awakened by '''Illaoi''' are {{tip|untargetable}}, will not show their hitboxes, nor go dormant, and will take half the amount of time to make an attack. This however does not affect the {{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}} attack from ''{{ai|Tentacle Smash|Illaoi}}''.
wiki_detail.knockdown: |flavorsound  = {{sm2|Illaoi_Original_Move_29.ogg}} ''"There are kind and gentle gods. Mine isn't one of those."''
wiki_detail.notes:
{{Effect at cast time end}}
* '''Illaoi''' spawns the '''''{{ai|Prophet of an Elder God|Illaoi|{{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}}}}''''' 700 range away from her, unless there's a natural wall blocking the way making the '''''{{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}}''''' spawn on it, with an angle relative to the direction she's facing.
** 1+ champions: one {{ai|Prophet of an Elder God|Illaoi|{{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}}}} at 0 degrees. (towards '''Illaoi's''' facing direction)
** 2+ champions: one {{ai|Prophet of an Elder God|Illaoi|{{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}}}} at 60 degrees.
** 3+ champions: one {{ai|Prophet of an Elder God|Illaoi|{{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}}}} at 300 degrees.
** 4+ champions: one {{ai|Prophet of an Elder God|Illaoi|{{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}}}} at 120 degrees.
** 5+ champions: one {{ai|Prophet of an Elder God|Illaoi|{{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}}}} at 240 degrees.
** 6+ champions: one {{ai|Prophet of an Elder God|Illaoi|{{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}}}} at 180 degrees.
** '''''{{as|Tentacles|buzzword2}}''''' may spawn on base barriers. If '''Illaoi''' is in the center of a base barrier, all '''''{{as|Tentacles|buzzword2}}''''' will spawn in the same position and stack over each other, making it appear as if there was only one '''''{{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}}'''''.
** '''Illaoi's''' facing direction is decided by the position of the cursor on cast, but can also be changed mid-cast through other effects, such as {{si|Flash}}.
** If there are no walls nearby, spawning the last {{ai|Prophet of an Elder God|Illaoi|{{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}}}} will form a perfect hexagon.
* {{tip|Spell shield|Spell shields}} will block the ability's damage but will not prevent '''''{{as|Tentacles|buzzword2}}''''' from spawning.
* If '''Illaoi''' {{tip|death|dies}} within {{fd|0.25}} seconds of dropping down, she will spawn buffed '''''{{as|Tentacles|buzzword2}}''''', but she won't manage in time to buff the already spawned ones. {{bug|1|Added undocumented on 9.13}}
* If '''Illaoi''' is near a '''''{{as|Tentacle|buzzword2}}''''' that is about to spawn, it will spawn buffed by ''Leap of Faith'' even if '''Illaoi''' is no longer nearby.
* Using ''{{ai|Harsh Lesson|Illaoi}}'' after '''Illaoi''' drops down will command '''''{{as|Tentacles|buzzword2}}''''' to instantly attack, regardless if they were already attacking. Their old attack will keep on going and will hit while the second attack is on its animation attack. {{bug|1}}
** This makes it possible for the same tentacle to reduce its own damage by having the second attack hit too fast, which is not otherwise possible.
* Using ''{{ai|Harsh Lesson|Illaoi}}'' an instant before ''Leap of Faith's'' buff finishes will delay the '''''{{as|Tentacle's|buzzword2}}''''' attack. {{bug|1}}
